mapper.select: SELECT id, `user-id`, content, `reply-content`, status, `create-time` FROM t_feedback ORDER BY `create-time` DESC
SELECT id, `user-id`, content, `reply-content`, status, `create-time` FROM t_feedback WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, `user-id`, content, `reply-content`, status, `create-time` FROM t_feedback WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY `create-time` DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_feedback (`user-id`, content, `reply-content`, status, `create-time`) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{replyContent}, #{status}, #{createTime})
